creator: mason@blisses.org
text:
Correction should be something like: *** foo 2022-09-03 13:23:10.263433724 -0400 --- foo.fixed 2022-09-03 13:23:26.847697754 -0400 *************** *** 1,8 ****
  • Production: 13.1, 13.0, - 12.3
  • Upcoming: 12.4
    • --- 1,6 ---- ...but I can't actually find the text "Production:" with grep in the repo, so I'm not hazarding a guess as to what source actually needs patching.
